channel.title: Resources on Maven AI
channel.description: Recent content in Resources on Maven AI

item.title: 45 AI Skills Breakdown - Complete Guide
item.description:
45 AI Skills Breakdown

The Complete Autonomous AI System

Download the PDF version by entering your email below.

System Overview

Maven’s 45 skills work together as a complete autonomous AI company. Here’s every skill, what it does, and how to use it.

Architecture Layers

Orchestration Layer (1 skill)

  • AI Product Orchestrator

Control Layer (8 skills)

  • Task Decomposer
  • Feedback & Iteration Engine
  • Analytics Engineer
  • Experimentation Manager
  • Integration Engineer
  • Prompt Engineer
  • Release Manager
  • System Health Monitor

Execution Layer (30 specialist skills) Memory Layer (4 skills) Publishing (1 skill) Optimization (1 skill)
